name: 30 Days of Night: Dust to Dust
original_name: 30 Days of Night: Dust to Dust
overview: Detective Nick Maguire learns that his sister Sara, a nurse at the local penitentiary, disappeared during a mysterious prison break in which George escaped. While scouring the gritty streets of New Orleans, Nick finds George and learns that there was more to the prison break than anyone thought. Now, in order to save his sister, Nick will have to learn to trust George.

trailers.title: 30 Days of Night: Dust to Dust Trailer
